titleStmt.title: SII 5.994: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 994. (A.R. No. 129 of 1896). ON THE OUTER SIDE OF THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SVETARANYESVARA TEMPLE AT KADAPPERI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kaṭalcūḻnta pārmātarum pūmātarum kalaimātaru maṭalcūḻnta pormātarum cīrmātarum Amarntu vāḻa nāṟkaṭal cūḻ puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭalpol pukaḻ parappa Ātiyukamāmenna cotimuṭi pu[ ṉain=ta] ruḷi Aṟucamaiyamum Aimpūtamum
neṟiyil niṉṟu pārippa teṉṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷarum mutalāya maṉnavarkaḷ tiṟaicumantu vantīṇṭic cevippa Ūḻiūḻi varu ceṅko leḻupāru miṉitaḷippac cempon virasiṁ hāsa nattu puvaṉamuḻutu ṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko
virājakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra varttikaḷ śrīrājādhirājade vaṟku yāṇṭu Āvatu jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūṟkoṭṭat- tu taniyūr śrīmadhu rāntakacaturvedi maṅkalattu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil śrīmāhe
śva rak kaṇkāṇiceyvāṟkun de vakanmikaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṟkum Innāyanār de vatāṉam tinacintāmaṇipperunteruvil viyāpārikaḷukkuc camaintu meykiḻān ciriḷaṅko śrīkṛṣṇanu m taṇṭalaṅkiḻān śrīvāsude van śrīkṛṣṇanu m pākkamuṭaiyā
nu m maṇiyaṉ malaikiṉiyaniṉṟānu m pākkamuṭaiyān cantiuṭaiyānu m taṅṭa laṅkiḻāṉ matu rāntaka cilaceṭṭi toraṇacūranu m coḷamāṉ kaṇṭan maṇaliyum Ārvalaṅkiḻān tiruvūṟal tiruvekampamuṭaiyānu m Ikkuṭi mātavaṭi Aruḷāḷaperumāḷum U
ḷḷiṭṭa Itteruvil viyāpārikaḷom Innāyanār śrīpaṇṭārattu tirumeṟpūccu Upayañ celuttakkaṭavomāka kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 3 100 Ippaḻaṅkācu munnūṟṟukkum poṉ koṇṭu poliūṭṭāka nāḷoṉṟukku Iṭakkaṭavomāṉa tirumeṟpūc
cu 1- l Ittirumeṟpūccu Orupalamum nāḷtoṟum paṭiaṟa veḷḷai Aṟacetti cāttalām tirumeṟpūcce Iṣa pak kolāle cantirātittavarai Itteruviliruntu parimāṟum viyāpārikaḷe celuttakkaṭavomāka cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom śrīpaṇṭārattu paricaṭṭaThe inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 5.994 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
